caption: A man in a dark suit, white shirt, and red tie is captured in a sequence of shots during a formal event. In the initial scene, he is seated at a table alongside another man in a dark suit, where a water bottle and glasses are present. A nameplate on the table reads "Noel Fahey Event Chair" and is accompanied by the "IIEA" logo. The background features blue banners with the text "IIEA", "iiea.com", and "Sharing Ideas Shaping Policy", along with white stars. As the sequence progresses, the focus shifts to a close-up of the first man, who appears to be speaking. He stands before a banner with "IIEA" and "iiea.com" visible. Across the frames, he is seen speaking and gesturing with his right hand while looking slightly downward and to the side. The website "iiea.com" is displayed as a watermark in the bottom corners of the frames.
